training_status: Working out more than ever during stall period

benefits.description: Lost 40-45 pounds in about 4 months, then hit a stall. After taking a month off dieting and dropping to 1mg/wk Reta, restarted weight loss and is peeling off final 14 pounds more easily

protocol_notes: Hit a weight loss stall after losing 40-45 lbs in ~4 months despite tight diet and increased workouts. Took a month off dieting and reduced Reta to 1mg/wk. Resumed weight loss approximately 2 weeks before posting.
